<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：AdultsCerdelga is indicated for the long-term treatment of adult patients with Gaucher disease type 1 (GD1), who are CYP2D6 poor metabolisers (PMs), intermediate metabolisers (IMs) or extensive...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Gaucher disease（98.5%）</li>
<li>autosomal ichthyosis syndrome with fatal disease course（98.4%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of adrenal gland（98.3%）</li>
<li>polycystic kidney disease 3 with or without polycystic liver disease（96.9%）</li>
<li>gastrocutaneous syndrome（96.7%）</li>
<li>familial generalized lentiginosis（96.6%）</li>
<li>Moynahan syndrome（96.4%）</li>
<li>rhabdoid tumor（96.2%）</li>
<li>osteopathia striata-pigmentary dermopathy-white forelock syndrome（96.1%）</li>
<li>congenital multiple café-au-lait macules-increased sister chromatid exchange syndrome（96.1%）</li>
<li>acromelanosis（96.1%）</li>
<li>X-linked lymphoproliferative disease due to SH2D1A deficiency（95.9%）</li>
<li>leukonychia totalis-acanthosis-nigricans-like lesions-abnormal hair syndrome（95.9%）</li>
<li>renal-hepatic-pancreatic dysplasia（95.8%）</li>
<li>Joubert syndrome with renal defect（95.2%）</li>
<li>peripheral nerve schwannoma（95.1%）</li>
<li>karyomegalic interstitial nephritis（95.0%）</li>
<li>schwannoma of twelfth cranial nerve（94.6%）</li>
<li>thoracic malformation（94.6%）</li>
<li>sympathetic neurilemmoma（94.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
